original_image_tags: A scanned document page, likely from a typed log or report. The page is white with black text and three punched holes along the top margin. The text is organized in a tabular format with column headers. The bottom right corner indicates "PAGE 77".

elements.description: A typed table listing 20 launch sequences (numbered 1507 through 1526) with columns for Launch Seq, Date, Nickname, Op #, Facility, Vehicle Type, Program, Cum By Booster, Command, and Cum By Command. The table contains data from October 1982 to June 1983. The text 'PAGE 77' is visible at the bottom right. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no visual content like photographs or diagrams, and describe the same typed table and page number.
